inputs.label: Scale Length
inputs.businessContext: The vibrating length of the string from nut to bridge, typically 0.33 m for a full-size violin.

inputs.label: Desired Pitch Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Frequency of the desired pitch, e.g., A4 = 440 Hz.

inputs.label: String Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Diameter of the string, e.g., 0.5 mm = 0.0005 m.

inputs.label: Material Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of the string material, e.g., gut ~1000 kg/m³, steel ~7800 kg/m³.
